official_functions.role: Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Dispatch the official Play clientbound bundle_delimiter packet id to the registered delimiter singleton
Write the full official Play clientbound framed bundle_delimiter packet
Confirm the decoded packet identity and listener surface

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns bundle_delimiter before all other Play clientbound packets.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the bundle_delimiter id to ClientboundBundleDelimiterPacket.
The official Play clientbound bundle_delimiter frame has no body bytes after the VarInt packet id.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove bundle grouping behavior, Play state transition handling, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer bundle grouping behavior, Play state transition handling, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
